questions.question: How many elders surround the throne in heaven?
questions.feedback: Twenty-four elders sit on thrones surrounding the central throne.

questions.question: How many living creatures surround the throne?
questions.feedback: Four living creatures, each covered with eyes, surround the throne.

questions.question: The living creatures never stop saying Holy, holy, holy.
questions.feedback: Day and night they never stop saying: Holy, holy, holy is the Lord God Almighty.

questions.question: The elders cast their _____ before the throne.
questions.feedback: The twenty-four elders lay their crowns before the throne.

questions.question: From the throne came flashes of lightning, rumblings, and peals of _____.
questions.feedback: From the throne came lightning, rumblings, and thunder.
